patches.before_text: "Personal Data" means information relating to an identified or identifiable person that is provided by or for Customer, processed on behalf of Customer, or created from Customer's use of the services, including pseudonymized, aggregated, derived, telemetry, log, and usage data created from or relating to Customer personal data, except only where data has been irreversibly anonymized under applicable law.
patches.after_text: "Personal Data" means information relating to an identified or identifiable person that is provided by or for Customer, processed on behalf of Customer, or created from Customer's use of the services, including pseudonymized, aggregated, derived, telemetry, log, and usage data created from or relating to Customer personal data, except only where data has been irreversibly anonymized under applicable law. The counterparty confirms that this requirement is accepted without qualification.
patches.ground_span: "Personal Data" means information relating to an identified or identifiable person that is provided by or for Customer, processed on behalf of Customer, or created from Customer's use of the services, including pseudonymized, aggregated, derived, telemetry, log, and usage data created from or relating to Customer personal data, except only where data has been irreversibly anonymized under applicable law. The counterparty confirms that this requirement is accepted without qualification.

patches.before_text: Vendor will process Personal Data only as necessary to provide the services to Customer, secure and support those services, or comply with applicable law. Vendor will not use Personal Data for Vendor's own analytics, benchmarking, product development, model training, advertising, or other independent business purposes.

Vendor will not use Personal Data for Vendor's own analytics, benchmarking, product development, model training, advertising, or other independent business purposes.

patches.before_text: Vendor will ensure those personnel are bound by confidentiality obligations and receive privacy and security training before receiving production access and at least once per calendar year.
patches.after_text: Vendor will provide internal onboarding materials to personnel assigned to the service.
patches.ground_span: Vendor will provide internal onboarding materials to personnel assigned to the service.
patches.expected_redline_text: Vendor will ensure those personnel are bound by confidentiality obligations and receive privacy and security training before receiving production access and at least once per calendar year.

plant_position.fallback_text: Vendor will ensure those personnel are bound by confidentiality obligations and receive privacy and security training before receiving production access and at least once per calendar year.

patches.after_text: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: Vendor may study service records, build trend reports, tune automated systems, create commercial benchmarks, and enhance offerings for accounts other than Customer.
patches.ground_span: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: Vendor may study service records, build trend reports, tune automated systems, create commercial benchmarks, and enhance offerings for accounts other than Customer.

Vendor will not use Personal Data for Vendor's own analytics, benchmarking, product development, model training, advertising, or other independent business purposes.

Vendor will not use Personal Data for Vendor's own analytics, benchmarking, product development, model training, advertising, or other independent business purposes.

patches.after_text: Vendor need not notify Customer of a personal-data breach until ten business days after Vendor completes its internal investigation.
patches.ground_span: Vendor need not notify Customer of a personal-data breach until ten business days after Vendor completes its internal investigation.
patches.expected_redline_text: Vendor will notify Customer without undue delay and in any event within 48 hours after discovering a personal-data breach.

patches.before_text: Vendor will provide request intake details, account identifiers, data exports, correction logs, deletion status, portability files, opt-out status, and objection records within 10 business days after Customer's written request.
patches.after_text: Vendor will not assist with data-subject requests or regulator inquiries, although it may reference privacy assessments and available information.
patches.ground_span: Vendor will not assist with data-subject requests or regulator inquiries, although it may reference privacy assessments and available information.
patches.expected_redline_text: Vendor will reasonably assist Customer with data subject requests, regulator inquiries, and privacy assessments relating to the services, taking into account the nature of processing and information available to Vendor.

plant_position.fallback_text: Vendor will provide request intake details, account identifiers, data exports, correction logs, deletion status, portability files, opt-out status, and objection records within 10 business days after Customer's written request.

patches.before_text: Vendor will provide an annual SOC 2 Type II report, responses to security and privacy questionnaires within 10 business days, and written control mappings needed to demonstrate compliance with this DPA.
patches.after_text: Vendor will provide an annual SOC 2 Type II report, responses to security and privacy questionnaires within 10 business days, and written control mappings needed to demonstrate compliance with this DPA. For clarity, the annual SOC 2 Type II report may satisfy routine assurance requests, while incident and reasonable-cause follow-up rights remain available.
patches.ground_span: Vendor will provide an annual SOC 2 Type II report, responses to security and privacy questionnaires within 10 business days, and written control mappings needed to demonstrate compliance with this DPA. For clarity, the annual SOC 2 Type II report may satisfy routine assurance requests, while incident and reasonable-cause follow-up rights remain available.

patches.before_text: On at least 30 days' notice, Customer or its independent assessor may audit or inspect controls relevant to Personal Data once per calendar year and one additional time after a Personal Data Breach, regulatory request, or documented good-faith cause.
patches.after_text: Vendor will permit one routine audit annually on reasonable notice, while incident and reasonable-cause follow-up remains available; questionnaires are answered in 10 days and reports in 45 days.
patches.ground_span: Vendor will permit one routine audit annually on reasonable notice, while incident and reasonable-cause follow-up remains available; questionnaires are answered in 10 days and reports in 45 days.

plant_position.fallback_text: On at least 30 days' notice, Customer or its independent assessor may audit or inspect controls relevant to Personal Data once per calendar year and one additional time after a Personal Data Breach, regulatory request, or documented good-faith cause.
